hero.title: Shared Ledger, Simplified Life
hero.subtitle: Kalana makes shared accounting easy for everyone. With iCloud real-time sync, manage your group finances anytime, anywhere.

features.title: Why Choose Kalana
features.subtitle: Elegant design, powerful features - make accounting a pleasure
features.icloud_desc: Using Apple CloudKit technology, your data is securely stored in iCloud with multi-device sync. Never worry about data loss again.
features.multiuser_desc: Invite family, friends or colleagues to manage shared accounts together. View member expenses in real-time with complete transparency.
features.report_desc: Automatically generate monthly and yearly reports with clear expense trends. Multi-dimensional analysis by category and member.
features.calendar_desc: View daily income and expenses in calendar format. Intuitive daily spending overview with easy access to historical records.
features.budget_desc: Set monthly budget targets and receive timely notifications when spending approaches or exceeds your budget.
features.privacy_desc: Your financial data is stored only in your personal iCloud account. We cannot access your sensitive information.

download.title: Get Started
download.subtitle: Download Kalana from the App Store and begin your smart shared accounting journey

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_p1: Kalana ("we", "our", or "Kalana") values your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your information when you use the Kalana app.
privacy.intro_p2: By downloading or using Kalana, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy. If you disagree with any terms, please do not use our app.
privacy.data_provided_l1: Account Information: When you create a Kalana account, you may provide basic information such as your name (optional) and iCloud account details.
privacy.data_provided_l2: Ledger Data: All ledger data you create while using Kalana, including transaction records, categories, member information, and budget settings.
privacy.data_provided_l3: Contacts: If you choose to invite others to a ledger, we access your contacts to help you select invitees.
privacy.data_auto_l1: Device Information: Including device type, OS version, device identifiers, used for troubleshooting and optimizing app experience.
privacy.data_auto_l2: Usage Data: Anonymous statistics about how you use Kalana, helping us improve product features.
privacy.data_auto_l3: Log Data: Technical logs generated during app operation, used for diagnosing issues and monitoring app health.
privacy.data_storage_p: We use Apple CloudKit to store and manage your data. Here are our data security measures:
privacy.data_storage_l1: iCloud Storage: Your ledger data is stored in your personal iCloud account, protected by Apple's security infrastructure.
privacy.data_storage_l2: Data Encryption: Data uses TLS/SSL encryption during transmission and AES-128 or stronger encryption at rest.
privacy.data_storage_l3: Regional Storage: Your data is stored in corresponding data centers based on your iCloud settings.
privacy.data_storage_l4: Access Control: Only you and members you explicitly authorize can access the relevant data.
privacy.important_note: Important: As app developers, we cannot directly access your ledger data stored in iCloud. Your data is completely controlled by you and Apple's security systems.
privacy.data_usage_l1: Provide, maintain and improve Kalana features and services
privacy.data_usage_l2: Enable multi-device sync of ledger data
privacy.data_usage_l4: Send you service-related notifications (like budget alerts)
privacy.data_usage_l6: Analyze user behavior to enhance experience
privacy.no_sell_p: We do not sell your personal information to any third-party advertisers or data brokers.
privacy.shared_members_p: When you invite others to your ledger, you explicitly agree to share relevant data in that ledger with them.
privacy.providers_p: We may use third-party service providers to support our business operations, including:
privacy.providers_l2: App analytics and crash reporting services
privacy.providers_p2: These providers are obligated to protect your information and use data only per our instructions.
privacy.legal_p: We may disclose your information when required by law, such as responding to court orders or law enforcement requests.
privacy.your_rights_p: You have the following rights regarding your data:
privacy.your_rights_l1: Access: You can access all your data through the Kalana app at any time.
privacy.your_rights_l2: Correction: You can correct or update your personal information.
privacy.your_rights_l3: Deletion: You can delete your account and all related data. After deletion, your data will be permanently removed.
privacy.your_rights_l4: Export: You can export your ledger data in common formats (like CSV).
privacy.your_rights_l5: Withdraw Consent: You can withdraw consent for non-essential data collection.
privacy.children_p: Kalana is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy.third_party_p: Kalana may contain links to third-party websites or services. This Privacy Policy does not apply to these third-party services.
privacy.updates_p: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. For significant changes, we will:
privacy.updates_p2: Continued use of Kalana means you accept the updated policy.
privacy.contact_p: If you have any questions or requests about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
privacy.contact_p2: We will respond within a reasonable time.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.service_p1: Kalana is a multi-user shared accounting app that provides data storage and sync via Apple iCloud services.
terms.service_p2: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using Kalana. By downloading, installing, or using Kalana, you agree to be bound by this policy.
terms.account_req_l1: You must have a valid Apple ID to use Kalana's full features
terms.account_req_l2: Ensure your iCloud account information is accurate, complete, and up-to-date
terms.account_req_l3: You are fully responsible for all activities under your account
terms.account_sec_p: You are responsible for maintaining your account security:
terms.account_sec_l1: Keeping your Apple ID and password secure
terms.account_sec_l2: Not sharing your account credentials with others
terms.account_sec_l3: Notifying us immediately if your device is lost or stolen
terms.account_sec_l4: Setting appropriate screen lock passwords or biometrics
terms.usage_intro: You agree to use Kalana only for lawful purposes:
terms.usage_not_l1: Use Kalana for any illegal, fraudulent, or harmful activities
terms.usage_not_l2: Attempt unauthorized access to other users' accounts or data
terms.usage_not_l3: Use automated tools to disrupt or abuse the service
terms.usage_not_l4: Spread malware, viruses, or destructive code
terms.usage_not_l5: Attempt to crack or damage app security
terms.usage_not_l6: Infringe others' IP, privacy, or other legal rights
terms.usage_not_l8: Impersonate others or falsely represent relationships
terms.usage_ledger_l1: Ledger content you create belongs to you
terms.usage_ledger_l2: You are fully responsible for content shared in shared ledgers
terms.usage_ledger_l3: Ensure necessary authorization before inviting others to ledgers
terms.usage_ledger_l4: Respect other members' privacy and data security
terms.data_p: Kalana uses Apple CloudKit to store your data:
terms.data_l1: Your data is stored in your personal iCloud account
terms.data_l2: Sync depends on your network and iCloud service status
terms.data_l3: We don't guarantee iCloud service availability
terms.data_l4: We recommend regular backups of important data
terms.ip_p: The Kalana app itself (including design, features, icons, content) is protected by intellectual property laws.
terms.ip_l1: We retain all IP rights to Kalana
terms.ip_l2: You may not copy, modify, distribute, or sell any part without authorization
terms.ip_l3: You retain ownership of ledger data you create
terms.ip_l4: You grant us limited license to provide services
terms.availability_change_p: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate Kalana at any time without notice.
terms.availability_maint_p: We may perform regular or emergency maintenance, which may cause temporary unavailability.
terms.availability_disclaimer_p: Kalana is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties:
terms.availability_disclaimer_l1: Implied warranties of merchantability, fitness, or non-infringement
terms.availability_disclaimer_l2: Service will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free
terms.availability_disclaimer_l3: Accuracy or reliability of results obtained from service use
terms.availability_disclaimer_p2: You agree that we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages.
terms.liability_p: To the extent permitted by law, our total liability shall not exceed:
terms.liability_l1: Fees paid by you for Kalana (if any)
terms.liability_l2: Or, if no fees paid, $100 or equivalent local currency
terms.termination_user_p: You may terminate your account at any time by:
terms.termination_user_l2: Contacting our support team to request account deletion
terms.termination_us_p: If we believe you violated this policy, we may:
terms.termination_us_l3: Delete all data under your account
terms.policy_updates_p: We may update these Terms of Service. For significant changes:
terms.policy_updates_p2: Continued use of Kalana means you accept the updated policy.
terms.applicable_law_p: This Terms of Service is governed by applicable law. Any disputes shall first be resolved through friendly negotiation.
terms.contact_p: If you have questions about this Terms of Service, please contact us at:
terms.contact_p2: We will respond within a reasonable time.

support.title: Technical Support
support.subtitle: We're here to help whenever you need us
support.contact_p: If the above doesn't solve your problem, contact us at:
support.faq1_q: How do I download and install Kalana?
support.faq1_a: Kalana is currently in development and will soon be available on the App Store. Search for "Kalana" or visit our website download page.
support.faq2_a1: Kalana is designed for iOS devices, supporting:
support.faq3_q: How do I create a ledger?
support.faq3_l1: When first opening the app, tap "Create Ledger"
support.faq3_l4: Once created, start adding transaction records
support.faq4_q: How do I invite others to a ledger?
support.faq4_p: Kalana uses Apple CloudKit's sharing feature to invite members:
support.faq4_l1: Open the ledger you want to share
support.faq4_l4: Share invite link via iMessage, email, or QR code
support.faq4_l5: Once accepted, they can view and edit the ledger
support.faq4_note: Note: All members need to use Apple devices and be signed in to iCloud.
support.faq5_p: Yes, data security is our top priority:
support.faq5_l1: All data is stored in your personal iCloud via CloudKit
support.faq5_l2: Data is encrypted during transmission and storage
support.faq5_l3: We as developers cannot access your ledger data
support.faq5_l4: Only you and explicitly invited members can view ledger content
support.faq5_link: Learn more in our Privacy Policy.
support.faq6_p: If you encounter sync issues, try these steps:
support.faq6_l1: Check network: Ensure device is connected to internet
support.faq6_l2: Check iCloud status: Go to Settings > iCloud, confirm iCloud is enabled
support.faq6_l3: Re-login iCloud: Sometimes re-logging resolves sync issues
support.faq6_l4: Restart app: Fully close and reopen Kalana
support.faq6_l5: Update system: Ensure iOS/iPadOS is latest version
support.faq6_note: If issues persist, contact our support team.
support.faq9_p: Kalana's basic features are completely free, including:
support.faq9_note: We may introduce premium features in the future and will notify you in advance.
support.faq10_q: How do I report issues or provide feedback?
support.faq10_p: We value your feedback! Contact us via:
support.faq10_l3: Provide info: Include device model, iOS version, and detailed problem description
support.troubleshoot_open_l4: If issues persist, try deleting and reinstalling
support.troubleshoot_data_l1: Check if iCloud is working properly
support.troubleshoot_data_l2: Confirm using the same Apple ID
support.troubleshoot_invite_l1: Invite links have expiration; regenerate if expired
support.troubleshoot_invite_l2: Ensure both sender and receiver use latest app version
support.contact_note: We typically respond within 1-3 business days. Please provide device model, iOS version, and problem description.
support.contact_p2: If the above content does not solve your problem, contact us at:
